game_info.title: Untitled Game
game_info.concept: **喫茶ブレンド物語 (Cafe Blend Story):** 喫茶ブレンド物語 is a cafe management simulation game where players design and operate a cafe by placing furniture like counter seats, table seats, and ambiance-enhancing items such as newspaper racks and stand lights on a grid-based layout using tap controls. Players develop new drink and food recipes by combining various ingredients, aiming to create high-quality menu items that cater to diverse customer preferences and moods to increase satisfaction and revenue. The core loop involves serving customers, earning money to expand the cafe, hiring and training staff, and participating in "food tasting competitions" with custom "set menus" to gain reputation and awards. Progression is driven by accumulating funds to purchase new furniture, unlock advanced ingredients, and eventually relocate or open additional cafes in new towns, with the ultimate goal of achieving a "five-star" cafe rating and maximizing overall profit and customer loyalty.
game_info.description: Welcome to Cafe Blend Story! You are the owner of a small cafe with big dreams. Serve customers by creating delicious drinks and food recipes, manage your cafe layout, and earn money to expand your business. Customers arrive with different preferences and moods - satisfy them to earn revenue and reputation. Unlock new ingredients, upgrade your cafe with furniture, and work towards achieving a prestigious five-star rating. Balance customer satisfaction, efficient service, and strategic expansion to build the ultimate cafe empire!
game_info.controls:
Arrow Keys: Navigate menu cursor / Move selected item
Space: Select/Confirm action (place furniture, serve customer, combine ingredients)
Z: Cancel/Go back
Shift: Open quick menu (recipe creation, furniture placement, view stats)
Enter: Start game
ESC: Pause/Unpause game
R: Restart game (from game over screen)

TEST_1.test_description: Basic functionality test that validates core game mechanics including customer spawning, recipe creation, serving, and basic progression. Tests that the game can handle fundamental operations without errors.
TEST_1.strategy_description: Create a basic recipe, serve a few customers, earn initial money, and verify that game state updates correctly. Test navigation through menus and basic interactions.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: Successfully create recipes, serve customers, earn money, and confirm that all core systems work without crashes. Game should progress smoothly through initial phases.

TEST_2.test_description: Win condition test that implements an optimal strategy to achieve five-star rating and win the game. Tests complete gameplay loop from start to victory.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: Achieve GAME_OVER_WIN state by reaching five-star cafe rating. All progression systems should work correctly, and win condition should trigger appropriately when goals are met.
